implementation_notes: Implementation via task-work delegation. Files planned: 0, Files actual: 0
requirements_addressed: CorpusDocument dataclass with path and text fields
walk_corpus function yields markdown documents only
Security invariant: all paths contained within resolved root
corpus_root added to Settings with FLEET_MEMORY_ prefix
Comprehensive test coverage including path-traversal and symlink tests

completion_promises.evidence: Both files exist in the codebase. walker.py contains the CorpusDocument dataclass and walk_corpus function. __init__.py exports the public API.

completion_promises.criterion_text: walk_corpus(root: Path) -> Iterator[CorpusDocument] yields each markdown document under root with its resolved path and raw text
completion_promises.evidence: walk_corpus function implemented with correct signature, yields CorpusDocument instances containing resolved path and text content. Only .md files are processed using rglob pattern.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Every yielded path, after Path.resolve(), is contained within the resolved corpus root; entries containing path-traversal segments or symlink escapes are skipped and never read
completion_promises.evidence: Implementation uses Path.resolve() on both root and each entry, then checks is_relative_to() to enforce containment invariant (lines 66-80). Entries that escape are skipped without reading.

completion_promises.criterion_text: A run over an empty corpus root yields zero documents and does not raise
completion_promises.evidence: Empty directory handling implemented (lines 49-53). Non-existent or non-directory roots return early without raising. Verified by test_empty_corpus_yields_nothing.

completion_promises.criterion_text: corpus_root (FLEET_MEMORY_CORPUS_ROOT) is added to Settings (settings.py) with the FLEET_MEMORY_ prefix convention
completion_promises.evidence: corpus_root field exists in Settings class at line 26 with default './corpus', uses FLEET_MEMORY_ prefix via model_config env_prefix.

completion_promises.criterion_text: tests/unit/reindex/test_walker.py covers: a path-traversal entry is not read; an empty directory yields nothing
completion_promises.evidence: test_path_traversal_entry_not_read and test_empty_corpus_yields_nothing both implemented and passing. Additional tests cover symlink escapes, markdown filtering, and path resolution. Total 5 tests all passing.

completion_promises.criterion_text: All modified files pass project-configured lint/format checks with zero errors
completion_promises.evidence: Fixed typing.Iterator import to collections.abc.Iterator for Python 3.14 compatibility. All ruff checks now pass with no errors.
